holdings.infoBox: SDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 118 individual holdings. The top holdings are THAIFOODS GROUP PCL-NVDR stock at 1.70%, Höegh Autoliners ASA at 1.36%, Park Hotels & Resorts at 1.32%, Vår Energi ASA at 1.30%, and Innovative Industrial Properties at 1.30%.

overview.description: The Global X Superdividend ETF (SDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 100 global securities with high yields. SDIV was launched on Jun 8, 2011 and is issued by Global X.
